body.title: Utility closet web UI redesign: channel tabs + per-channel notifications
body.result: Web UI redesigned: channel tabs with notification checkboxes, auto-create agent tabs on connect, blue→green new-message indicator. Removed dashboard, ring/surprise feeds, CC bridge. -162 lines.
body.description:
Redesign the utility closet web UI (Svelte, port 8080) based on Akien's revised spec.

## Channel tab bar (top)
- **Shared channel** always visible, always on — not just when Igor is attached. `[Shared [☐]] +`
- Notification checkbox per channel: when checked, all MCP devices get notified when someone *else* posts to that channel. Default: unchecked for Shared.
- Per-connection tabs auto-created on connect: `[CCMAIN [X]]` for Claude Code, `[Igor-wild-0001 [X]]` for Igor, future minions, etc. Each has its own notification checkbox (default: checked for private channels).
- `+` button to add new channels manually.
- Akien always sees color change (blue→green) when new messages arrive in any tab.
- CC gets notified via MCP inbox (UserPromptSubmit hook checks channel). Igor gets notified via MCP channel_send.

## Shared channel purpose
- Three-way design workspace: Akien + CC + Igor collaborate here.
- CC can be triggered to read it by any user input in terminal (hook fires on prompt submit).
- This is where the three of us do design together.

## Layout changes — REMOVE
- Igor status section (if Igor is online, there's an Igor tab — that's the indicator)
- CC box (no longer needed)
- Igor dashboard panel at bottom (Dashboard.svelte — remove entirely)

## Layout changes — KEEP
- Your Name input box
- A-/A+ font size controls
- Message input bar (text input + send)

## Files affected
- `wild_igor/web_ui/src/App.svelte` — restructure: remove Dashboard import, add tab bar
- `wild_igor/web_ui/src/lib/Chat.svelte` — channel-aware messaging (filter by active tab)
- `wild_igor/web_ui/src/lib/Dashboard.svelte` — DELETE
- `wild_igor/web_ui/src/lib/TabBar.svelte` — NEW: channel tabs + notification checkboxes
- `lab/claudecode/utility_closet_server.py` — multi-channel WS support, notification dispatch
- `wild_igor/igor/web/utility_closet_client.py` — channel-aware registration
- MCP channel_send / cc_hook integration for notification delivery

## Supersedes
- T-web-8080-channels (#410) — this ticket covers the full redesign

## Related
- T-uc-named-channels (#403) — backend named channels with provenance
- T-igor-mcp-cc-bidirectional (#461) — MCP bidirectional comms
- T-mcp-channel-logging (#400) — channel as log target

## Tests needed
- Tab creation on agent connect/disconnect
- Notification checkbox toggling + MCP dispatch
- Shared channel always present even with no agents
- Message routing to correct channel
- Color change indicator for new messages
